findings.title: Command injection via os.popen in ping endpoint
findings.description: User-supplied host parameter concatenated directly into os.popen() shell command without sanitization

findings.title: Command injection via subprocess shell execution in DNS lookup helper
findings.description: Domain parameter passed through helper function into subprocess.Popen with shell=True via string formatting

findings.title: Command injection via os.system in archive helper
findings.description: Filepath from JSON body embedded into tar command via os.system() in helper function while only archive name is sanitized

findings.title: Multi-parameter command injection in log search shell pipeline
findings.description: Three user-controlled parameters interpolated into tail|grep shell pipeline with insufficient single-quote wrapping

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in port check
findings.description: Host parameter from JSON body embedded into nc command via subprocess.Popen with shell=True
